client_confirmations_accepted_matches_al.name: client_confirmations_accepted_matches_all_terms
client_confirmations_accepted_matches_al.value: "client_confirmations"."status" <> 'ACCEPTED'::client_confirmation_status or ("client_confirmations"."client_accepts_btc" is true and "client_confirmations"."confirms_description" is true and "client_confirmations"."confirmed_amount" is not null and "client_confirmations"."confirmed_due_at" is not null and "client_confirmations"."terms_version" is not null)

mainnet_demo_armed_timestamp.name: mainnet_demo_armed_timestamp
mainnet_demo_armed_timestamp.value: "mainnet_demo_runs"."status" not in ('ARMED'::mainnet_demo_status, 'ACTIVE'::mainnet_demo_status, 'COMPLETED'::mainnet_demo_status) or "mainnet_demo_runs"."armed_at" is not null

mainnet_demo_active_timestamp.name: mainnet_demo_active_timestamp
mainnet_demo_active_timestamp.value: "mainnet_demo_runs"."status" not in ('ACTIVE'::mainnet_demo_status, 'COMPLETED'::mainnet_demo_status) or "mainnet_demo_runs"."activated_at" is not null

mainnet_demo_terminal_timestamp.name: mainnet_demo_terminal_timestamp
mainnet_demo_terminal_timestamp.value: "mainnet_demo_runs"."status" not in ('COMPLETED'::mainnet_demo_status, 'STOPPED'::mainnet_demo_status, 'ABORTED'::mainnet_demo_status) or ("mainnet_demo_runs"."stopped_at" is not null and length("mainnet_demo_runs"."stop_reason") >= 5)

mainnet_readiness_route_values.name: mainnet_readiness_route_values
mainnet_readiness_route_values.value: ("mainnet_readiness_audits"."route_prepared" is false and "mainnet_readiness_audits"."receiver_amount_units" is null and "mainnet_readiness_audits"."estimated_asset_fees_units" is null and "mainnet_readiness_audits"."quote_prepared_at" is null and "mainnet_readiness_audits"."quote_expires_at" is null) or ("mainnet_readiness_audits"."route_prepared" is true and "mainnet_readiness_audits"."receiver_amount_units" > 0 and "mainnet_readiness_audits"."estimated_asset_fees_units" >= 0 and "mainnet_readiness_audits"."quote_prepared_at" is not null and "mainnet_readiness_audits"."quote_expires_at" > "mainnet_readiness_audits"."quote_prepared_at" and "mainnet_readiness_audits"."quote_expires_at" <= "mainnet_readiness_audits"."quote_prepared_at" + interval '60 seconds' and "mainnet_readiness_audits"."estimated_asset_fees_units" * 10000 <= "mainnet_readiness_audits"."receiver_amount_units" * "mainnet_readiness_audits"."max_slippage_bps")

mainnet_readiness_go_requires_operationa.name: mainnet_readiness_go_requires_operational_proofs
mainnet_readiness_go_requires_operationa.value: "mainnet_readiness_audits"."status" <> 'GO'::mainnet_readiness_status or ("mainnet_readiness_audits"."working_dir_persistent" is true and "mainnet_readiness_audits"."operator_named" is true and "mainnet_readiness_audits"."external_probe_enabled" is true and "mainnet_readiness_audits"."external_execution_attempted" is false and "mainnet_readiness_audits"."route_prepared" is true and "mainnet_readiness_audits"."quote_prepared_at" <= "mainnet_readiness_audits"."completed_at" and "mainnet_readiness_audits"."quote_expires_at" > "mainnet_readiness_audits"."completed_at" and "mainnet_readiness_audits"."reconciliation_matched" is true and "mainnet_readiness_audits"."backup_restore_verified" is true and "mainnet_readiness_audits"."backup_proof_hash" ~ '^[a-f0-9]{64}$' and "mainnet_readiness_audits"."refundable_count" = 0 and "mainnet_readiness_audits"."unknown_payment_count" = 0)

pool_settlement_simulations_values_non_n.name: pool_settlement_simulations_values_non_negative
pool_settlement_simulations_values_non_n.value: "pool_settlement_simulations"."payment_usd_cents" >= 0 and "pool_settlement_simulations"."principal_usd_cents" >= 0 and "pool_settlement_simulations"."external_costs_usd_cents" >= 0 and "pool_settlement_simulations"."applicable_losses_usd_cents" >= 0 and "pool_settlement_simulations"."net_result_usd_cents" >= 0 and "pool_settlement_simulations"."platform_result_usd_cents" >= 0 and "pool_settlement_simulations"."contributors_result_usd_cents" >= 0
